  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 35,

  "order": ["stop-greasing", "isolate-asset", "inspect-seal-condition", "clean-purged-grease", "verify-relief-path", "check-bearing-housing-venting", "confirm-regrease-quantity-interval", "replace-seal-if-damaged", "document-cause"],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Seal purged due to over-greasing — bearing housing over-pressurized",
    "Seal integrity compromised; lubricant contamination path open",
    "Relief/vent path may be blocked or regrease procedure non-compliant",
    "Continued operation risks grease ingress into motor windings or adjacent components"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop greasing immediately and isolate the asset",
    "Inspect seal for permanent deformation or damage; replace if compromised",
    "Clean all purged grease from housing exterior and surrounding components",
    "Verify bearing housing relief/vent path is clear",
    "Confirm correct regrease quantity and interval per OEM/SKF guide",
    "Do not return to service until seal integrity is confirmed"
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing has purged the seal, indicating housing over-pressurization and a compromised seal. This is an installed-defective condition. Work must stop and the root cause (blocked vent, wrong grease gun volume, wrong interval) must be corrected before any regreasing continues. Proceeding risks bearing failure, contamination, and grease migration into adjacent components.",
  "references": ["SKF bearing mounting guide — relubrication quantity and interval", "Timken bearing installation guide — seal inspection and housing vent verification"]
}
